The pack closes the RP06.P08.M02 Type And Shape Definition tail (6 rows), implements the full M03 Primary Implementation Slice Hermes-receipt cycle (22 rows incl. documentation update + operator summary), and opens the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head (12 rows) as three descriptor-only sections.

Live cursor live_next_unit_id RP06.P08.M02.S15 confirms CP00-228 is the live pack; CP00-227.next_pack_id=CP00-228 chains correctly.

README CP00-228 anchor present. contracts/dms-core-contract.json current_pack=CP00-228 with a hermes_receipt_slice_descriptor projection whose pack_binding, authority_boundary, hermes_packet, claude_packet, and every M02/M03/M04 row match builder output (pass/pass_with_findings/block verdict descriptors, blocks_closeout_descriptor true, claude_final_approval_claimed false, human_approval_route_required_before_runtime true, executes_command_runtime false, no_real_data true). Grep of changed sources found no writeFile/fs/child_process/fetch/.query/spawn calls and no PII/secret material.

Tests/validation: model.test.js has three CP228 tests (coverage 40/M03=22; descriptor-only rows + PASS/BLOCK + claude_is_final_approval false; evidence packets/handoff to CP00-229/production_ready_flag). validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs asserts coverage.valid, slice.valid, section_count 3, claude_is_final_approval false, production_ready_candidate true, read_only true, allowed_claude_tools, handoff to CP00-229/RP06.P08.M04.S13, and no-write attestation regression/promotes_claude/enterprise_trust all false. command-evidence.json records 18 commands (node --check/--test, rp05/rp06/closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/rp00/goal/fullplan validates, npm test, validate, build, git diff --check) at exit 0; post-review-gated commands (closeout-pack:validate, plan:generate, cached diff) correctly deferred.

Boundaries honored: production_ready:false with status implemented_pending_review (no premature enterprise-trust claim); production_ready_candidate true is validation-backed only. no_real_data:true; writes_product_state:false. Hermes control-plane is descriptor-only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false; receipt_shape ..._no_write) and not embedded in product runtime. Claude remains read-only independent reviewer, not final approver; human final approval remains required outside this receipt.

CP178+ hardening: forbidden_review_evidence encodes auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_or_enterprise_trust_claim; hardened_review_sequence keeps Claude as a single read-only capture step ahead of normalize/receipt_validate/adjudication/construction_inspection/final_closeout_validation. readiness-report auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid JSON, no errors). No pre-baked raw-output.json/review-receipt.json/claude-review-result.json exists, so the verdict is not predetermined. Unrelated dirty/untracked files (.docx, enterprise-v2-loop-roadmap, ldip invalid-attempt, loop-system-integration, spec-v2-integration) are correctly preserved and excluded; active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty. The changed-file-scope preservation list also lists the pack's own docs/closeout-packs/cp00-228/ dir and new-session-handoff.md (both also in untracked_implementation_files) — a benign overlap in the scope generator with no functional effect, since nothing active is omitted and the manifest worktree_transition_policy classifies them correctly.

No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects, coverage gaps, or boundary violations attributable to CP00-228.
